scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @cannabis-tinctures/shared" "npm run dev -w @cannabis-tinctures/server" "npm run dev -w @cannabis-tinctures/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cannabis-tinctures/shared && npm run build -w @cannabis-tinctures/client && npm run build -w @cannabis-tinctures/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cannabis-tinctures/shared && npm run typecheck -w @cannabis-tinctures/server && npm run typecheck -w @cannabis-tinctures/client
